infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GreekGeek uses your location to verify that study sessions are started from approved study locations.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GreekGeek uses background location to detect when you leave an approved study location and end your active study session.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GreekGeek uses your location to verify that study sessions are started from approved study locations.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: GreekGeek uses background location to detect when you leave an approved study location and end your active study session.
